documentation.text: @dev Helper function to return a min betwen the two uints
@notice This function is overridden by the test Mocks.

@notice If anybody sends Ether directly to this contract, consider he is
  getting SNTs.

@notice This method will can be called by the owner before the contribution period
  end or by anybody after the `endBlock`. This method finalizes the contribution period
  by creating the remaining tokens and transferring the controller to the configured
  controller.
@return Total tokens issued in weis.
@return Total Ether collected.
@notice This function is overridden by the test Mocks.
@notice Pauses the contribution if there is any issue
@notice Resumes the contribution
@notice The Dev (Owner) will call this method to extract the tokens

@notice This method should be called by the SGT holders to collect their
  corresponding SNTs

devdoc.author: Jordi Baylina
devdoc.details: This contract will be used to distribute SNT between SGT holders.  SGT token is not transferable, and we just keep an accounting between all tokens  deposited and the tokens collected.  The controllerShip of SGT should be transferred to this contract before the  contribution period starts.

params._newOwner: The address of the new owner. 0x0 can be used to create  an unowned neutral vault, however that cannot be undone

params._token: The address of the token contract that you want to recover  set to 0 in case you want to extract ether.

devdoc.title: SGTExchanger Contract

changeOwner(address).notice: `owner` can step down and assign some other address to this role

claimTokens(address).notice: This method can be used by the controller to extract mistakenly  sent tokens to this contract.

collect().notice: This method should be called by the SGT holders to collect their  corresponding SNTs
